authenticity.title: Dhugummaa
authenticity.description: Uffanni hundi mala hojii harkaa aadaa Oromoo fi Itoophiyaa irratti hundaa’een hojjetama.

sustainability.title: Itti Fufiinsa
sustainability.description: Meeshaalee naannoo hin miine fi hojii oomishaa sirrii ta’e fayyadamna.

community.title: Hawaasa
community.description: Aartisaanota keessaa deeggaruun mootummaa fi mootummaa aadaa Oromoo eegsisuuf hojjenna.

quality.title: Qulqullina
quality.description: Dizaayinii hunda keessatti hojii harkaa fi qulqullina olaanaa irratti xiyyeeffanna.
